hooks.command: git fetch origin --prune --quiet 2>/dev/null; echo "[git] synced origin. local main $(git rev-parse --short main 2>/dev/null) | origin/main $(git rev-parse --short origin/main 2>/dev/null) — НЕ судить о merge/branch-состоянии по локальным ref без свежего fetch."

echo '[claude-protocol] Read CLAUDE.md. Pipeline: planner -> architect -> tdd-engineer -> implementer -> reviewer -> release-engineer. Human approval between stages. Test-first. Vertical slices only.'

echo '[claude-protocol] You touched code. Before claiming done: (1) is there a failing test that pinned this change? (2) run scripts/quality-check.sh (3) update docs/features/<slug>/ artifacts if scope shifted.'
echo '[claude-protocol] Stopping. Checklist: tests green? lint/types clean? DoD met (CLAUDE.md §7)? If a stage handoff is next, name the agent and the artifact path.'
